name: monday
description: Reads monday.com data and models all canonical monday.com GraphQL operations with safe CLI metadata, bounded direct reads, and reverse-ETL write actions.

risk.read: external monday.com GraphQL API reads through streams and bounded fixed-document direct reads
risk.approval: reads require none; writes require reverse ETL plan, preview, approval, execute with typed confirmation for sensitive/admin/destructive actions
risk.write: monday.com GraphQL mutations are modeled as reverse ETL write actions; live dispatch requires plan, preview, approval, execute, and typed confirmation where sensitive/admin/destructive
